Package io.forja.components.layout.fxCard

Class FxCard

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
javafx.scene.layout.VBox
io.forja.components.layout.fxCard.FxCard
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class FxCard extends javafx.scene.layout.VBox
A surface container with three optional slots — header, body, footer.

FxCard extends VBox and renders, in order, whichever of header, body, and footer are set. Slots can be mutated at any time and the children list rebuilds automatically.

The preferred way to construct an FxCard is via the builder:

     
      FxCard card = FxCard.builder()
          .header(titleRow)
          .body(content)
          .footer(actionsRow)
          .variant(CardVariant.OUTLINED)
          .gap(SpacingSize.MD)
          .build();
See Also:
  • CardVariant
  • FxCard.Builder
